name: Nectarine Raspberry Ice
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine water and gelatin in a saucepan. Stir over medium heat until the gelatin is dissolved.
2. Stir in white wine and sugar until dissolved. Remove from heat and set aside.
3. Puree raspberries, nectarines, lemon zest, and lemon juice in a blender.
4. Combine with wine syrup until blended.
5. Pour into a shallow pan and freeze until firm.
6. Soften slightly, then beat smooth in a mixer.
7. Refreeze and keep frozen until ready to serve.
This recipe yields about 7 1/2 cups of raspberry ice or about 15 half-cup servings.
Content per Serving (serving size 1/2 cup): calories - 62.
